overview: Career Compass is a smart platform that helps students and job seekers discover their ideal career path through a guided assessment, then provides a step-by-step personalized roadmap with curated learning resources and progress tracking to go from confused to confident.
features: Multi-step career assessment questionnaire with interests & skills input
Logic-based career recommendation engine with 5–8 matched career paths
Personalized step-by-step roadmap with milestones, skills, and timelines
Curated learning resources hub with videos, courses, and articles per skill
Skill gap analysis comparing current skills vs roadmap requirements
Progress tracking dashboard with visual completion bars and milestone checkboxes
User profiles persisted with Internet Identity authentication
